input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The observed javac failure is from stale test code using older ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructor shapes, not from missing setup.

Avoid full Maven build execution in generated tests unless carefully isolated, because MavenCli build paths may touch the local Maven repository or network; unit-level coverage such as CLI --version, diagnosers, runtime information, lifecycle/plugin classes, and bundled resources does not require extra setup.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra dependency, Docker image, environment variable, or system property is required; maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its normal compile/runtime dependencies transitively and meaningful coverage can be reached through unit-level Maven core APIs.
